---
name: Bug report
about: Report a broken scraper, incorrect feed output, or pipeline failure
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

### Source affected

Source key from `src/sources.js` (e.g. `blog-engineering`, `claude-code-releases`). Write `pipeline` if it's not source-specific.

### What happened?

A clear description of the issue.

### Expected behavior

What should have happened instead?

### Evidence

Paste any of the following if available:
- Error from [`run-report.json`](https://sefaertunc.github.io/anthropic-watch/feeds/run-report.json)
- GitHub Actions log snippet
- Feed output showing the problem

### Environment

- Running in: GitHub Actions / locally
- Node version:
- OS (if local):
